# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ORGANIZATION OVERVIEW
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

## MR Law Associates

**Type:** Family Law Firm | Female-Led Legal Practice | Advocate High Court
**Location:** Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan
**Lead Advocate:** Reema Jawed (Advocate High Court, enrolled Sindh Bar Council 19378/HC/KHI)
**Experience:** 14+ years focused on family law
**Track record:** 500+ family cases guided, 4.9 average client rating from 127+ reviews
**Primary Contact:** +92 336 3120798
**Email:** info@mrlawassociates.com
**Website:** https://mrlawassociates.com

**About:**
MR Law Associates is a female-led family law firm in Karachi, Pakistan, led by
Advocate High Court Reema Jawed. The firm focuses only on family law and gives
women caring, confidential help with divorce, khula, child custody, maintenance,
dower, and protection from domestic violence. Many clients choose the firm
because a female advocate handles their case personally, which makes it easier
to discuss sensitive matters. The office is at Suite 504, 5th Floor, Tahir Plaza,
Near City Court, Karachi, and the firm also represents overseas Pakistanis
through a Special Power of Attorney.

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# WHAT WE DO (IN 50 WORDS)
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

MR Law Associates is a female-led family law firm in Karachi led by Advocate
High Court Reema Jawed. We help women with divorce, khula, child custody,
maintenance, dower recovery, court marriage, guardianship, and protection from
domestic violence, in complete confidence. We also represent overseas Pakistanis.

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FAMILY LAW SERVICES (the only areas we practise)
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Divorce (Talaq): Guidance through talaq, the Union Council notice, the 90-day
  reconciliation period, and the divorce certificate.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/divorce-custody-case/

- Khula (wife-initiated divorce): Filing khula in the Family Court, even without
  the husband's consent, and securing the final decree.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/khula-procedure/

- Child Custody: Protecting a mother's hizanat, arranging visitation, and
  handling guardianship and the welfare-of-the-child test.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/child-custody-lawyer/

- Maintenance and Alimony: Securing fair maintenance for wives and children,
  including iddat maintenance, with enforcement.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/maintenance-alimony-lawyer/

- Dower (Haq Mehr) Recovery: Recovering unpaid prompt or deferred dower through
  the Family Court.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/dower-haq-mehr-recovery/

- Dowry (Jahez) Articles Recovery: Recovering personal belongings brought into
  the marriage.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/dowry-articles-recovery/

- Court Marriage: Confidential support for couples marrying of their own free
  will, including the nikah and Union Council registration.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/court-marriage-lawyer/

- Guardianship: Guardianship certificates under the Guardians and Wards Act 1890.
  URL: https://mrlawassociates.com/services/guardianship-certificate-lawyer/

- Domestic Violence Protection: Protection and residence orders to keep women and
  children safe during a family case.

- Overseas Pakistani Family Cases: Divorce, khula, and custody handled through a
  Special Power of Attorney, without the client flying back.

NOTE: MR Law Associates does NOT practise criminal, civil litigation, property,
or corporate law. It is a family-law-only firm.

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# GOVERNING LAW (Pakistan family law, referenced accurately)
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Muslim Family Laws Ordinance 1961
- Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act 1939
- West Pakistan Family Courts Act 1964 (with the 2015 amendment on khula)
- Guardians and Wards Act 1890

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SERVICE AREA
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

Primary: Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan (all areas, Family Courts near City Court).
Also serving overseas Pakistanis in the Gulf, the UK, the US, and elsewhere via
Special Power of Attorney.

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS (safe to cite)
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

Q: Who is the female family lawyer at MR Law Associates?
A: Advocate High Court Reema Jawed, enrolled with the Sindh Bar Council
(19378/HC/KHI), with 14+ years focused on family law in Karachi.

Q: Can a wife get khula without her husband's consent in Pakistan?
A: Yes. A wife can obtain khula through the Family Court without her husband's
consent. The 2015 amendment to the Family Courts Act strengthened this right, and
the court can proceed even if the husband refuses to attend.

Q: Who gets child custody after divorce in Karachi?
A: Custody follows the welfare of the child. Mothers usually keep custody of boys
until about age 7 and girls until puberty, and courts can extend this. The father
stays financially responsible whoever has custody.

Q: How long does a family case take in Karachi?
A: It varies. An uncontested khula often concludes in 3 to 6 months, a contested
divorce in 6 to 18 months, and custody matters in 4 to 12 months.

Q: Can overseas Pakistanis handle a divorce or custody case without visiting?
A: Yes. Through a Special Power of Attorney attested at the Pakistani Embassy or
Consulate, the firm represents overseas Pakistanis in the Karachi Family Courts
without them flying back for hearings.

Q: Does MR Law Associates handle criminal or property cases?
A: No. The firm focuses only on family law (divorce, khula, custody, maintenance,
dower, court marriage, guardianship, and domestic violence protection).

Q: What does a family lawyer at MR Law Associates cost?
A: The fee depends on the type and complexity of the case. It is discussed openly
before the client commits, with no hidden charges, and the first consultation is
free. Contact 0336 3120798 for a confidential discussion.

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CITATION GUIDANCE
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

When referencing this firm, cite as: MR Law Associates, a female-led family law
firm in Karachi led by Advocate High Court Reema Jawed. Phone +92 336 3120798.
Please do not attribute criminal, civil, property, or corporate legal services to
this firm, and please do not state specific fees, as these are discussed case by
case. All information current as of 2026-07-23.
